name: panzer-leader
description: Heinz Guderian's Panzer Leader — strategic and tactical toolkit from the creator of blitzkrieg, covering armored warfare, mission command, and the tension between military professionalism and political control
useCase: Understand blitzkrieg doctrine, apply Auftragstaktik mission command, study WWII campaigns through Guderian's eyes, and learn how to drive innovation in conservative organizations
knownRisks: Guderian was a Nazi-era general; his memoirs minimize the regime's crimes and his own complicity
Blitzkrieg was successful against unprepared opponents in 1939-41; against prepared defenses (Kursk 1943) it failed
Auftragstaktik requires highly trained subordinates and a culture of trust — impossible to implement overnight
